'''maguhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headcovering|headcovering]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headcovering|headcovering]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| maguhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mægihith|mægihith]] || [[word:mægihij|mægihij]] || [[word:mægihish|mægihish]] || [[word:mægihi|mægihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:maguguhuth|maguguhuth]] || [[word:maguguhuj|maguguhuj]] || [[word:maguguhush|maguguhush]] || [[word:maguguhu|maguguhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:maguhuth|maguhuth]] || [[word:maguhuj|maguhuj]] || [[word:maguhush|maguhush]] || [[word:maguhu|maguhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:magufhuth|magufhuth]] || [[word:magufhuj|magufhuj]] || [[word:magufhush|magufhush]] || [[word:magufhuf|magufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:maguhuthu|maguhuthu]] || [[word:maguhuju|maguhuju]] || [[word:maguhushu|maguhushu]] || [[word:maguhuku|maguhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:maguhuth|maguhuth]] || [[word:maguhuj|maguhuj]] || [[word:maguhush|maguhush]] || [[word:maguhu|maguhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:maguhuthul|maguhuthul]] || [[word:maguhujul|maguhujul]] || [[word:maguhushul|maguhushul]] || [[word:maguhukul|maguhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:maguhuthuthu|maguhuthuthu]] || [[word:maguhujuju|maguhujuju]] || [[word:maguhushushu|maguhushushu]] || [[word:maguhuku|maguhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:maguhuthun|maguhuthun]] || [[word:maguhujun|maguhujun]] || [[word:maguhushun|maguhushun]] || [[word:maguhukun|maguhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:maguhuthuoro|maguhuthuoro]] || [[word:maguhujuoro|maguhujuoro]] || [[word:maguhushuoro|maguhushuoro]] || [[word:maguhukuoro|maguhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
